summary: Completed Phase 4 Incident Tickets testing. All 12 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: Ticket list with Branch column, adaptive detail view for negative_stock_override tickets (Product, Branch, Invoice, Stock Change, Cashier, Override by), Linked PO displayed for resolved tickets. Note: No open tickets available to test resolve dialog UI (all test tickets were resolved during backend testing).

issues: Console shows HTML hydration warnings about table elements - minor React DOM nesting issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend incident_tickets.py: STOCK_RESOLUTION_TYPES correctly defined with unencoded_po, count_error, wrong_item, shrinkage
Backend: GET /api/incident-tickets?branch_id=X correctly filters using $or query for branch_id, from_branch_id, or to_branch_id
Backend: GET /api/incident-tickets/resolution-types?ticket_type=negative_stock_override returns only 4 stock types
Backend: PUT /api/incident-tickets/{id}/resolve correctly stores linked_po_id and linked_po_number when provided
Backend: PIN authorization required for resolve - returns 400 without PIN, 403 with wrong PIN
Frontend IncidentTicketsPage.js: RESOLUTION_TYPE_META includes all 10 resolution types with icons and colors
Frontend: Adaptive detail view shows correct fields for negative_stock_override (Product, Branch, Invoice, Stock Change, Cashier, Override by)
Frontend: Sender Confirm button correctly hidden for negative_stock_override tickets (line 736 condition)
Frontend: Linked PO number displayed in detail view when present (line 577-580)
Frontend: Investigation guide shown for open negative_stock_override tickets with 4 root cause options
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
seed_data_creation: Resolved several test tickets during backend testing including one with linked PO
context_for_next_testing_agent: All negative_stock_override tickets have been resolved during testing. To test the resolve dialog UI with stock resolution types dropdown and Link PO search field, you would need to create a new negative stock sale (which auto-creates a ticket). The resolved ticket NSO-20260317-8CA3A3 has linked PO: PO-B1-001014 and can be used to verify the Linked PO display in detail view.

tests: GET /api/incident-tickets returns tickets array with total count
GET /api/incident-tickets?branch_id=X filters tickets by branch (11 total → 5 for Branch 1)
GET /api/incident-tickets/resolution-types?ticket_type=negative_stock_override returns 4 stock types: unencoded_po, count_error, wrong_item, shrinkage
GET /api/incident-tickets/resolution-types returns all 10 types when no filter
Timeline contains note with action='note', by_name, detail, at timestamp
PUT /api/incident-tickets/{id}/resolve without PIN returns 400 'Authorization PIN required'
PUT /api/incident-tickets/{id}/resolve with wrong PIN returns 403 'Invalid PIN'
PUT /api/incident-tickets/{id}/resolve with linked_po_id/linked_po_number stores PO reference
Resolved ticket has linked_po_id and linked_po_number fields populated
Resolution as unencoded_po does NOT create journal entry (no capital loss)
Ticket detail has all required fields: product_name, branch_id, invoice_number, qty_before_sale, qty_after_sale, cashier_name, override_by_name, override_method

details: Incident Tickets page loads with data-testid='incident-tickets-page'
Branch column visible in table header
Ticket rows show ticket number, type/product, branch, impact, resolution, status, assigned, date
Both NSO- (negative stock) and INC- (transfer) ticket types displayed
Linked PO field shown: 'PO-B1-001014' for resolved ticket
Timeline shows full history including notes and resolution
Sender Confirm button NOT shown for negative_stock_override tickets
Button only appears for transfer variance tickets
